products.title: Spring Elegance
products.desc: A delicate blend of peonies, tulips, and roses — perfect for springtime gifting and bright smiles.

products.title: Berry Chic
products.desc: A stylish composition of roses, seasonal greenery, and vibrant berries — a bold and elegant floral statement.

products.title: Lavender Dream
products.desc: A rich bouquet with lavender, lisianthus, and roses — ideal for those who love deep hues and gentle fragrance.

products.title: Peach Meadow
products.desc: A soft and radiant arrangement of peach and blush roses with lush greenery in a straw basket — light and natural.

products.title: Blush Romance
products.desc: A premium bouquet of deep pink and ivory roses, complemented by silver eucalyptus — sophisticated and intimate.

products.title: Pastel Garden
products.desc: A pastel-toned mix of spray roses and greenery in a woven basket — gentle, airy, and perfect for any occasion.

products.title: Tulip Charm
products.desc: A vivid bouquet of bright tulips and roses in a lavender box — cheerful and full of charm.

products.title: Berry Bloom
products.desc: A lush mix of rich pink, purple, and cream blooms with textured greens — romantic and elegant.

products.title: Sweet Whisper
products.desc: A charming spring bouquet with peonies, roses, and lilac-toned accents — fresh, lively, and expressive.

products.title: Field Joy
products.desc: A rustic hand-tied bouquet of sunflowers, lisianthus, and daisies — perfect for brightening the day.

products.title: Soft Bloom
products.desc: A delicate bouquet of pink carnations and roses wrapped in satin paper — soft, stylish, and versatile.

feedbacks.text: Flora made my anniversary unforgettable. The bouquet was fresh, beautifully arranged, and arrived exactly on time. Will definitely order again.
feedbacks.author: Emma Thompson

feedbacks.text: I ordered a bouquet for my mother's birthday and she was in tears — the good kind. Stunning arrangement and lovely packaging.
feedbacks.author: Daniel Roberts

feedbacks.text: The flowers lasted over two weeks, which never happens with other shops. Incredible quality and such a thoughtful selection.
feedbacks.author: Olivia Martinez

feedbacks.text: Fast delivery, perfect condition, and the blooms smelled absolutely wonderful. Flora is my go-to for every special occasion.
feedbacks.author: James Wilson

feedbacks.text: Ordered the Spring Elegance bouquet and it exceeded every expectation. The peonies were enormous and so fresh.
feedbacks.author: Sophie Clarke

feedbacks.text: Beautiful flowers and genuinely helpful staff. They suggested the perfect arrangement for a sympathy gift — tasteful and heartfelt.
feedbacks.author: Michael Bennett

feedbacks.text: I've tried many flower shops in the city but Flora stands apart. The arrangements feel artistic, not just assembled.
feedbacks.author: Charlotte Evans

feedbacks.text: Proposed with a Flora bouquet and she said yes. Partly thanks to those roses, I'm sure of it.
feedbacks.author: Noah Harris

feedbacks.text: Ordered for a colleague's farewell and the whole office was impressed. Generous size, vibrant colours, and a lovely ribbon.
feedbacks.author: Amelia Scott

feedbacks.text: The lavender bouquet I received as a gift from Flora is still brightening my desk a week later. Exceptional freshness.
feedbacks.author: Liam Johnson
